title: grewia glandulosa
intro: Grewia glandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grewia glandulosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
